title.en: The Lord of Blood Peng was shocked.

content.en:
Rumble!!!

As soon as Ye Tian pointed out, he directly shook the Lord of Blood Peng, and even the mutilated Extreme Dao Exotic Treasure Spear that was sacrificed was thrown out.

"How is it possible that you have comprehended so many extreme paths?"

The Lord of Blood Peng was shocked.

So many Extreme Dao powers were fused together, and the power that erupted was too terrifying, plus Ye Tian's own strength was far superior to him, so under this finger attack, his Blood Peng Dao Killing Technique was directly forced.

However, not only that, he also endured Ye Tianwandao's extreme attack.

Click!

The Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestral Body of the Lord of Blood Peng began to collapse, and the Extreme Dao Origin also began to shatter.

He can't live.

In the blink of an eye, the Lord of Blood Peng died.

At this time, the expressions of the other Extreme Dao creatures changed drastically.

The Lord of the Blood Peng is one of the most terrifying Extreme Path creatures among them, he has a certain reputation in the Extreme Path Deep Sea, and he is also the heir of a true realm perfect controller, although he is not a purebred Extreme Path creature, but his bloodline is higher than that of ordinary purebred Extreme Path creatures.

With the Lord of Blood Peng burning blood, holding the mutilated Strange Treasure and Strange Treasure, and bursting out with all the power of the Extreme Dao Strange Treasure, a single blow can severely damage the ordinary Immortal Perfect Controller.

But even so, the Lord of Blood Peng was still killed by Ye Tianyi's finger.

This strength is too terrifying, this is still a super-perfect controller, it shouldn't be a disguise of a perfect controller of the Void Realm.

However, the perfect controller of the Void Realm can't enter the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm!

Puff puff!!!

Ye Tian kept making moves, and in the blink of an eye, all the eight hundred Extreme Dao creatures here were killed by Ye Tian.

Outside.

Ye Tian's ranking on the killing list continued to improve, and he soon rose to the first place on the killing list.

And two names have disappeared from the kill list, one is the Lord of the Blood Peng, and the other is the Lord of the Raven.

The Lord of the Ravens is just that, occasionally entering the kill list, occasionally falling.

But the Lord of Blood Peng is different, his strength is far superior to that of the Lord of the Crows.

Extreme road to the deep sea.

When the Lord of Blood Peng fell, this news surprised those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Deep Sea Palace.

"The Endless Lord of the End of the World is so powerful, he has killed so many Extreme Dao creatures with his own strength, and he has also killed that little guy of Blood Peng, he is a demon again!"

"He must be killed, otherwise he will really gain great benefits in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and his rise will be faster. If you have the opportunity, let the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller who has infiltrated the end of the realm take action, kill him in an instant, and let him have no chance to rise!"

"Let's deal with the matter of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm first, let more Extreme Dao creatures take action, hundreds of Extreme Dao creatures can't do it, then thousands, tens of thousands, I don't believe that I can't kill him." "

Immediately, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace continued to give orders.

......

The end of the world, the east gate of the pole.

The Lord of the Ancient sensed the killing list, and was immediately shocked when he saw that Ye Tian had quickly entered the first place on the killing list.

He knew exactly what it meant to go from the top 10 to the top of the kill list.

This is definitely not as simple as killing a few Extreme Dao creatures, but killing a lot of Extreme Dao creatures, plus the Extreme Dao creatures on the kill list just now disappeared, they must have died at Ye Tian's hands.

"Just now, it should have been a large number of Extreme Dao creatures that were organized to besiege the Endless Lord on the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, but they were killed by the Endless Lord!" guessed the Ancient Lord.

At this time, the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were also extremely shocked, the first place on the killing list, this is an unprecedented glory, although it has not been completely decided, but it has also broken the record in the history of the end of the world.

"Lord of the Ancients, congratulations to you Wudao Tower, I didn't expect your Wudao Tower to cultivate such a demon!"

"Lord of the Ancients, your Endless Lord of the Daoless Tower, this time it can be said that you are overpowering an era, and you have killed so many Extreme Dao creatures, I am afraid that the Extreme Dao Deep Sea will be furious. They are not like us cultivators, our cultivators have fallen into the will clone, and it can't be affected, but the Extreme Dao creatures have no clones, and these Extreme Dao creatures are really dead when they die, and killing so many Extreme Dao creatures is afraid that it will cause the Extreme Dao Deep Sea to besiege and kill your Endless Lord of the Daoless Tower at all costs. "

"The Extreme Dao Deep Sea should not dare to enter the realm and invade the Pathless Tower, the cost is too great, just pay attention to it. However, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea would definitely not allow the Will Clone of the Endless Lord to live in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, otherwise they would lose face. It's a pity that even if the Lord of Infinity obtains a huge amount of resources this time, it is estimated that he will not be able to bring it out. If we can bring it out, there are so many good things, I guess even we will be excited!"

These Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers said one by one.

The Lord of Canggu frowned slightly, if Ye Tian's will clone fell in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, the loss would indeed be great.

There are indeed a lot of Extreme Dao treasures there, for Ye Tian, it can speed up his cultivation and increase the foundation, such as breaking the chains of the Extreme Dao, he needs a large amount of Extreme Dao substances!

And in this regard, he couldn't help Ye Tian.

Therefore, the resources of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm are related to Ye Tian's foundation and potential, if Ye Tian's will clone falls in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, the loss will be great!

"I hope Ye Tian can survive!"

The Lord of the Ancient Heavens secretly said.

But he also knew very well that if the Extreme Dao Deep Sea really let the Extreme Dao creatures of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm surround Ye Tian at all costs, Ye Tian really had no way to compete.

......

At this time.

Ye Tian was very happy, after killing so many Extreme Dao creatures, all the resources they had found before had fallen into Ye Tian's hands, and there were many Extreme Dao creatures that carried a lot of resources themselves.

For example, there are quite a few super-perfect treasures he has found, and there are eight of them, which are all astronomical when converted into resources!

"There are so many super-grade perfect treasures, and if they are traded to the Wudao Tower, they can be exchanged for many benefits. In short, this time it was released, which is enough for me not to worry about resources before entering the perfect controller of the Shala. "

Ye Tian said with a smile.

To him, these extreme creatures are simply fortune boys!

Of course, he also knew very well that he had stabbed the hornet's nest, and those extreme creatures would definitely not forget it, and would definitely continue to besiege him.

Next time, the strength of the Extreme Path creatures who want to besiege him will be even stronger, and the number will definitely not be only eight hundred.

However, he is not lacking.

"If you want to kill me, the Extreme Creatures of the Perfect Controller, you can't do it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Until now, he hadn't really burst into full strength.

Therefore, he was looking forward to these extreme creatures coming to besiege him.
